Hero.title1: More than coffee: territory, music, and
Hero.subtitle: We connect Colombian specialty coffees with cultural and educational initiatives that create opportunities for new generations in the regions where our coffee is born.

Footer.desc: Connecting Colombian coffee communities with the world.

Cta.desc: Behind every origin there are communities, youth, cultural initiatives, and coffee families building the future of their territories. COLBREW™ seeks to connect those stories with people who believe in the transformative power of Colombian coffee.

Origins.desc: Discover the territories where our specialty coffees are born and the communities that make them possible. Every cup is a window to the culture, resilience, and flavor of Colombia.

origins.title: Apía, Risaralda
origins.desc: Coffee territory known for its tradition, Andean landscapes, and the work of families who have built a deep culture around coffee.

origins.title: Jardín, Antioquia
origins.desc: An origin where coffee tradition, cultural heritage, and natural wealth are part of the territory's identity.

origins.title: Ciudad Bolívar, Antioquia
origins.desc: Mountains, coffee growing, and communities that have found in coffee an opportunity to preserve their identity and build a future.

origins.title: Planadas, Tolima
origins.desc: A territory recognized for its resilience and specialty coffees, where the community builds a future through coffee.

origins.title: Líbano, Tolima
origins.desc: A territory where coffee tradition has united generations and the agricultural legacy strengthens community development.

pillars.title: Coffee with purpose
pillars.desc: We promote Colombian specialty coffees that represent territories, producers, and communities.

pillars.title: Culture and youth
pillars.desc: We support cultural initiatives and music schools that strengthen new generations.

pillars.title: Territory and impact
pillars.desc: Every origin connects coffee, local identity, and opportunities for regional development.

Storytelling.subtitle: Our Landscape
Storytelling.heading: Respect for the Earth
Storytelling.desc: Every protected hectare is a legacy for future generations of coffee growers throughout Colombia.

steps.label: Origin coffee
steps.desc: We select specialty coffees with territorial identity.

steps.label: Producers and communities
steps.desc: We work together with coffee regions committed to quality.

steps.label: Culture and youth
steps.desc: We support cultural initiatives that strengthen opportunities for new generations.

steps.label: Conscious consumers
steps.desc: People who value the origin and impact behind every cup.

steps.label: Sustainable future
steps.desc: We build connections that generate value for the territories.
